name: What's the first thing I should do after realizing AI screwed my LA injury claim?
description: Call a lawyer now; preserve records; halt AI.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the first thing I should do after realizing AI screwed my LA injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call a lawyer now; preserve records; halt AI.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Contact a licensed attorney immediately to review and mitigate damage.[1] Stop all AI use.[1] Key factors: assess discoverability; strategy pivot; evidence preservation.[1] Gather medical/police records; avoid insurer contact; document timeline.[1] Time-sensitive protection needed.
